name: Exchange Jewelry
description_short: Exchange Jewelry is a credit repair provider based in Union City, New Jersey. Rated 4.7/5 with 70 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Exchange Jewelry is a credit repair provider serving clients in Union City, New Jersey. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 70 reviews, Exchange Jewelry has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Union City area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a pawn shop, Exchange Jewelry provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Union City, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Exchange Jewelry operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Union City, New Jersey area who are considering Exchange Jewelry should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
